mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, role, enabled, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, role, enabled, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{role}, #{enabled}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users
role = #{role}, enabled = #{enabled},
password = #{password},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
